description: Enforce Astro SSR with Cloudflare D1 and Shadcn UI standards.
conditions: Whenever retrofitting or building Astro SSR applications on Cloudflare.
actions: Ensure @astrojs/cloudflare adapter is used in 'server' mode.
Use Astro.locals.runtime.env to access Cloudflare bindings (like D1, R2).
Utilize <ViewTransitions /> combined with transition:persist for continuous media playback components.
Enforce strict dark theme variables in CSS.
Never output partial code; provide full, copy-pasteable files.
